pre.message: A bare empty catch block was added in packages/core/src/integrations/redis/redis-dc-subscriber.ts. Errors raised inside the try will be silently swallowed.

post.message: LLM judge was requested but is unavailable (no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY or the upstream call errored); deterministic-only verdict stands for this run.

A eslint-disable suppression was added in dev-packages/e2e-tests/test-applications/deno-redis/src/app.ts. The checker was silenced rather than the underlying diagnostic resolved; if the PR claims a fix, the suppressed warning may be the defect shipping with its alarm turned off.
